title: First Tom and Gisele---Now Colgate and Palmolive?
text: An activist challenge starts a discussion of how the consumer-goods giant might break up.

title: Colgate-Palmolive Company (CL) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 28, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants John Faucher - Chief Investor Relations Officer Noel Wallace - Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer Stan Sutula - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Peter Grom - UBS Dara Mohsenian - Morgan Stanley Andrea Teixeira - JPMorgan Chris Carey - Wells Fargo Securities Bryan Spillane - Bank of America Jason English - Goldman Sachs Kevin Grundy - Jefferies Olivia Tong - Raymond James Callum Elliott - Bernstein Lauren Lieberman - Barclays Kaumil Gajrawala - Credit Suisse Robert Ottenstein - Evercore Jonathan Feeney - Consumer Edge Nik Modi - RBC Capital Markets Mark Astrachan - Stifel Steve Powers - Deutsche Bank Operator Good morning. Welcome to today's Colgate-Palmolive Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Q3 Earnings Meet Estimates
text: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 0.97%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Colgate-Palmolive shares off premarket after sales miss despite 11.5% price hike
text: Colgate-Palmolive Co. stock CL, -0.27% slid 0.4% in premarket trade Friday, after the consumer goods giant missed sales estimates for the third quarter as inflationary pressures pushed costs higher and the strong dollar weighed. The company posted net income of $618 million, or 74 cents a share, for the quarter, compared with $634 million, or 75 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: Colgate Announces 3rd Quarter 2022 Results
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL): Net sales increased 1.0%; Organic sales* increased 7.0% with growth in every division and all four categories GAAP EPS declined 1% to $0.74; Base Business EPS* declined 9% to $0.74, both of which reflect a negative foreign exchange translation impact of $0.05 GAAP Gross profit margin and Base Business Gross profit margin* both decreased 220 basis points to 57.2% Net cash provided by operations was $1,883 million for the first nine

title: Colgate-Palmolive Q3 Preview: Back-To-Back EPS Beats Inbound?
text: Colgate-Palmolive registered a slight 1.4% EPS beat in its latest print.

title: Got $1,000? These 2 Dividend Kings Are Trading Near Their 52-Week Lows
text: There aren't many companies that have dividend growth streaks more impressive than these two stocks.

title: Can Colgate (CL) Beat Q3 Earnings Estimates Amid Cost Woes?
text: Colgate's (CL) Q3 results are expected to reflect gains from strong demand, brand strength, innovation and digital growth, offset by higher raw material and logistic costs.

title: Could This Sleepy Dividend King Suddenly Wake Up?
text: Sometimes a simple action is all that's needed to unleash a company's true, underlying value.

title: Despite Steady Gains Since 2018, Colgate-Palmolive Stock Has Underperformed The S&P
text: Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE: CL) stock price rose almost 1.25x from $60 at 2018 end to around $73 currently, primarily due to favorable changes in its sales.

title: Is Colgate stock a ‘buy' after Dan Loeb built a stake?
text: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE: CL) is in focus on Tuesday after Dan Loeb's Third Point was reported to have built a decent-sized stake in the producer of consumer products. Here's what the activist investor is after Loeb wants the multinational to consider spinning off “Hill's Pet Nutrition”.

title: Ex-Dividend Reminder: WD-40, Procter & Gamble And Colgate-Palmolive
text: On 10/20/22, WD-40, Procter & Gamble, and Colgate-Palmolive will all trade ex-dividend for their respective upcoming dividends.

title: Dan Loeb's Third Point builds stake in Colgate, sees value in pet food business in potential spinoff
text: Loeb said he sees hidden value in Colgate's subsidiary Hill's Pet Nutrition, a pet food company, if it were spun off.

title: Colgate-Palmolive Webcasts 2022 Third Quarter Earnings Conference Call October 28, 2022 – 8:30 a.m. ET
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) will provide a live webcast of its 2022 third quarter earnings conference call on Friday, October 28, 2022, at 8:30 a.m.
